steps.t: The Rohirrim are stationed at Lanbert's camp near the base of the Cuthstan. Lanbert has asked you to speak with the other soldiers in his company and …
Lanbert is at the Rohirrim-camp at the base of the Cuthstan. Lanbert is awaiting your return with the suitable weapons taken from Orcs.
Odda can be found to the south of the Cuthstan, hidden to the south of the road. Lanbert sent you to speak with Odda.
